productDisplayName: Puma Men Driving Power Black Shoes
description: The puma Driving Power Light Low SF ferrari men's shoes will give you even more street cred while still being comfortable. The motor-inspired details, Ferrari styling and low silhouette will make you want to find more reasons to wear them. The lace-up front gives you a customised, snug Fit for increased stability, and the rubber outsole provides maximum traction and grip.UpperLow top foamy rubber upper with synthetic overlays for durability and protectionPerforations on the upper for ventilationLace-ups for snug fitPadded ankle supportLightly padded collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for extra comfortJumping cat logo embroidered on the tongueFerrari badge embedded on the lateral side of the heelPlastic heel cup with the outsole reinforced onto itMidsoleEco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioningEVA midsole for better shock absorptionOutsoleRubber traction outsole with tyre tread pattern and heel bumper for better protection to the heel and better gripshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
